title: Add warning on conflicting multiple assignments (#2188)
body:
There are many combinations of drivers: always_comb'ish, always_ff'ish, initial, assign. I have started with tackling assign statements as they are easier to work with. 

I am looking for some feedback on my general approach before I move on with the other driver types.
1) Should I use the MULTIDRIVEN keyword or pick something else?
2) I have added a bitflag to UndrivenVarEntry. Is this the preferred approach or should I try to avoid adding bitflags?
3) I am handling the multidriven case inline in in the visitor. Should I add another bitflag and move it into the reportViolations method instead?

This is still work in progress.
